name: hb_2_34
requirements: As part of your analysis, compute and store: education_count_within_2km (OSM education features within 2km of Congtai Park station, int), station_mean_aqi, station_max_pm25 (Congtai Park station on 2025-06-15, float).

turns.query: Analyze air quality around EDUCATION facilities (schools) within 2km of Congtai Park monitoring station in Handan during 2025-06-15. Map all schools using OSM education features, correlate with pollution levels.
